data.title: Smoke Free Sweden: Nicotine Pouch Restrictions Deprive Canadian Women of Best Tool to Quit Smoking
data.description: Canadian policymakers are being cautioned on International Women’s Day about stringent regulations on oral nicotine pouches hindering access to a product associated with a significant decrease in female smoking globally. A report titled Empowerment in a Pouch highlights how availability of tobacco-free nicotine pouches has propelled Sweden’s advancement towards a smoke-free status, notably among women. The report underscores the urgent need for policymakers to consider the potential impact of limiting access to such products, especially in light of the positive influence it has had on female smoking rates.

data.title: Strike by Jack Mallers obtains licenses in New York for crypto & money services, offering Bitcoin brokerage, recurring buys, paycheck-to-Bitcoin.
data.description: Residents in New York can now utilize Strike's Bitcoin broker services, recurring purchase options, and salary-to-Bitcoin features following the granting of licensing approvals by the New York Department of Financial Services (NYDFS).

data.title: Court froze 70.6 Bitcoin linked to BlockFills case after Dominion Capital claimed fund misuse.
data.description: A total of 70.6 Bitcoins linked to BlockFills have been placed on hold by a federal judge. This action was taken following allegations from Dominion Capital regarding the misuse of customer funds. Dominion Capital has sought the return of disputed assets in this case.
